expectedSignal: control remains low residual and should not support candidate
expectedBaselineBehavior: baseline explains most residual pressure or leaves no residual
expectedMutationBehavior: mutation should not create candidate support
expectedReplayBehavior: replay may reproduce receipt but not residual strength
categoricalFalsifier: Candidate is falsified for this target if the selected strong baseline fully explains the residual or if replay cannot preserve the decisive receipt/descriptor summary.
falsifier: Kill or downgrade if baseline dominance is high, counterexample pressure expands, or decisive replay diverges.
noEditRule: Frozen before blind holdout selection; no post-hoc edits.
